description: Sync Marketo leads, lists, campaigns, programs, and activities into the Shielva knowledge base via the Marketo REST API.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: From Marketo Admin → LaunchPoint → your Custom service → View Details → Client ID.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Client secret from your LaunchPoint service
install_fields.help: From Marketo Admin → LaunchPoint → your Custom service → View Details → Client Secret.

install_fields.label: Munchkin ID
install_fields.help: From Marketo Admin → Munchkin. Format: three alphanumeric segments separated by hyphens (e.g. abc-123-xyz).

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate credentials by probing GET /leads.json with minimal params.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping Marketo leads probe and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Marketo leads, lists, campaigns, and programs into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Leads
methods.description: Paginated list of all Marketo leads.

methods.name: Get Lead
methods.description: Retrieve a single Marketo lead by ID.

methods.name: List Static Lists
methods.description: Paginated list of all Marketo static lists.

methods.name: List Campaigns
methods.description: Paginated list of all Marketo smart/batch campaigns.

methods.name: List Programs
methods.description: Offset-paginated list of all Marketo programs.
